title: HEST Foamy Camping Mattress Pad
bullets: Memory foam is extremely comfortable compared to anything else I've tried
Never woke up in pain after sleeping on it, even on the hard ground
Insulation is great - kept me warm from the ground even in snowy weather
Rolls up for transport - still a bit bulky but worth the tradeoff

title: Anker Portable Power Station SOLIX C300
bullets: Compact with enough capacity to cover me for 3-4 days with all my devices
Compact and easy to carry despite massive capacity
Chargable via solar panels, car, or wall outlet

title: LifeStraw Peak Series Personal Water Filter
bullets: Lets you drink out of any lake or stream
You can trust it really filters things out
Small and portable, and can save your life in an emergency
